action.reasoning: Observation: The previous heuristic got 15.52 safe follow steps. Analysis: The heuristic was too simple and didn't maintain the 1.5m distance properly, nor did it smoothly turn towards the human. Decision: Implement a robust P-controller for distance and angle when the human is visible or close. Use ShortestPathFollower only when the human is far and not visible. This should significantly improve the safe follow steps. I will update predict.py and test_follower.py, run test_follower.py to verify, and submit eval.
